enum_handling_ambiguity.description: Reviewers disagree on how to classify enums. Key questions: 2-value descriptive enums → switch or select? Read-only 2-value enums → sensor/enum or binary_sensor?

multi_field_handling_ambiguity.description: Reviewers disagree on multi-field ERD handling. Key question: writable multi-field → number or sensor? Should all sub-fields be separate entities?

device_class_ambiguity.description: Reviewers disagree on device_class assignment. Key questions: when to assign device_class? Which device_class values to use?
